caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits Martinique
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds of 15 kt and wave heights of 3.1 ft, while Cartagena has a wind forecast of 16 kt. I expect the strong winds and high rain probability to impact port operations in Martinique and Cartagena today.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Build
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 21 kt winds with 5.2 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Marseille has 18 kt winds. I expect these conditions to persist with the dominant swell direction from the NE, impacting port operations in both Mykonos and Marseille.
